selected_idea.title: ATTA Adaptation for Regression-Based Pseudo-Labeling
selected_idea.pitch: EV010 notes unclear generalization of ATTA beyond classification. We adapt ATTA for regression tasks in pseudo-label selection.
selected_idea.mechanism: Modify ATTA framework to work with regression outputs by using distance-based uncertainty estimation instead of classification entropy.
selected_idea.testable_hypothesis: If we adapt ATTA for regression, AUC will reach 0.85 compared to baseline of 0.75 on digits dataset (regression version).

label: Micro-Probe
hypothesis: If we adapt ATTA for regression, AUC will reach 0.85 compared to baseline of 0.75 on digits dataset (regression version).
method: Modify ATTA framework to work with regression outputs by using distance-based uncertainty estimation instead of classification entropy.
expected_result: The proposed method (ATTA Adaptation for Regression-Based Pseudo-Labeling) should beat the baseline on the specified metric.
failure_interpretation: A weak or negative margin means the mechanism does not justify promotion and should be revised or killed.
